contexts.context: ...to Auden?  Perhaps the question is impossible to <mark>0135</mark> answer;  some may hold it to be inadmissible...
...mortality,by making objects which,unlike ourselves,are not subject to <mark>0135</mark> natural death,but can remain permantly permanently 'on hand'...
... "After all, he's your neighbour now".  I demurred with <mark>0135</mark> some energy, having a great dilslike of pursuing...
